nasb.text: The wicked, in the haughtiness of his countenance, does not seek Him. All his thoughts are, “There is no God.”

esv.text: In the pride of his face the wicked does not seek him; all his thoughts are, “There is no God.”

cnv.text: 惡人面帶驕傲，說：“耶和華必不追究！” 在他的一切思想中，都沒有　神。

ccb.text: 他们狂傲自大，心中没有上帝， 从不寻求耶和华。

csbs.text: 恶人面带高傲，不寻求耶和华； 他所有的心思中都没有神。
